title: Braided articles and methods for their manufacture
abstract: Aspects herein are directed to braided articles and methods for their manufacture. The braided articles may include articles of footwear having braided uppers. The braided uppers may include a base yarn and a high performance yarn. The high performance yarn may form a braided structure within the braided upper. The braided structure may be continuously braided to provide continuous support to a wearer's foot when the article of footwear is worn as intended, by a wearer.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A braided article of footwear comprising: a sole; and a braided upper coupled to the sole, the braided upper comprising a first surface and a second surface, the braided upper formed from at least a high performance yarn and a base yarn, the first surface of the braided upper defining a toe portion, a heel portion, a medial midfoot portion and a lateral midfoot portion extending between the toe portion and the heel portion, and a throat portion between the medial midfoot portion and the lateral midfoot portion, wherein the high performance yarn forms a braided framework that is integrally and contiguously braided with at least a portion of the braided upper. 2. The braided article of footwear of claim 1, the second surface defining an underfoot portion of the braided upper. 3. The braided article of footwear of claim 2, wherein the braided framework that is integrally and contiguously braided with the portion of the braided upper continuously extends through the underfoot portion of the braided upper. 4. The braided article of footwear of claim 1, wherein the high performance yarn comprises one or more of a composite yarn, an aramid material yarn, a liquid crystal material yarn, a carbon fiber yarn, or a combination thereof. 5. The braided article footwear of claim 1, wherein the base yarn comprises one or more of a nylon, a polyester, a cotton, a hemp, a polyethylene, a polypropylene, silk yarn, bamboo, or a combination thereof. 6. The braided article of footwear of claim 1 , wherein the contiguous and integrally braided framework is configured to circumferentially reinforce the braided upper. 7. The braided article of footwear of claim 4, wherein the contiguous and integrally braided framework further extends out of the braided upper along the medial midfoot portion and the lateral midfoot portion forming one or more eyelets to accommodate a shoelace. 8. The braided article of footwear of claim 5, wherein the one or more eyelets are continuously braided with the braided framework as one or more braided strands that extend out of the braided upper at a first location and enter the braided upper at a second location along the respective medial midfoot portion or lateral midfoot portion. 9. A braided article of footwear comprising: a braided layer forming a braided upper comprising a base yarn and a high performance yarn, wherein the high performance yarn and a base yarn, forms a braided framework extending across the braided layer, wherein the braided upper is defined by at least a toe portion, a heel portion, a throat portion, a medial midfoot portion, and a lateral midfoot portion. 10. The braided article footwear of claim 9, wherein the high performance yarn has a higher strength than the base yarn. 11. The braided article of footwear of claim 9, wherein the high performance yarn is comprised of a thermoplastic coated polyester yarn. 12. The braided article of footwear of claim 9, wherein the thermoplastic comprises thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU). 13. The braided article of footwear of claim 9, wherein the high performance yarn comprises one or more of an aramid material yarn, a liquid crystal material yarn, a carbon fiber yarn, or a combination thereof. 14. The braided article footwear of claim 9, wherein the base yarn comprises one or more of a nylon yarn, a polyester yarn, a cotton yarn, a hemp yarn, a polyethylene yarn, a polypropylene yarn, a silk yarn, a bamboo yarn, or a combination thereof. 15. A method of forming a braided article of footwear, the method comprising: providing a unitary braided component formed by interlacing a plurality of yarns base yarns and one or more high performance yarns, wherein the high performance yarns form an integrally braided pattern where the plurality of base yarns and the one or more high performance yarns are interlaced in at least two different directions; forming a braided upper from the unitary braided component, the braided upper having a toe portion, a heel portion opposite the toe portion, a medial midfoot portion and a lateral side between the toe portion and the heel portion, and a throat portion between the medial midfoot portion and the lateral midfoot portion, wherein the integrally braided pattern does not extend across the throat portion; and affixing a sole framework to the braided upper. 16. The method of claim 15, wherein the high performance yarn is comprised of a thermoplastic coated polyester yarn. 17. The method of claim 15, wherein the thermoplastic comprises thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU). 18. The method of claim 15, wherein the high performance yarn comprises one or more of an aramid material yarn, a liquid crystal material yarn, a carbon fiber yarn, or a combination thereof. 19. The braided article footwear of claim 15, wherein the base yarn comprises one or more of a nylon yarn, a polyester yarn, a cotton yarn, a hemp yarn, a polyethylene yarn, a polypropylene yarn, a silk yarn, a bamboo yarn, or a combination thereof. 20. The braided article footwear of claim 15, wherein the high performance yarns have a higher strength than the base yarns.
